title: Set Home
description: This datapack allows you to mark a location as your home and teleport back to it later!
body:
# **Important**
Remember to do "/reload" when first loading into the world with this datapack!


# **Set Home**
To set your home simply run the command "/trigger SetHome", this will mark the current location you are standing on your home.

# **Returning To Home**
To return to your home simply run the command "/trigger Home", this will teleport you to your home location that you have marked before.

# **Other Datapacks To Play With!**
Dacommander31's Mob Progression datapack adds different difficulty tiers to minecraft mobs!
